creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 231527
cgal 5.4

math/cgal: Udpate to 5.4

- Changes: https://www.cgal.org/2022/01/31/cgal54/
- QT5 and Visualization options removed. There are only DEMOS and EXAMPLES now, but I have not added them.
- poudriere 13amd64 OK for math/cgal and databases/sfcgal SFCGAL tests passed.

Maybe one could ask for an exp-run or someone can build other ports depending on CGAL?
